item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 90 pts (0.455) Buffalo Sabres – 88 pts (0.438) Tampa Bay Lightning – 84 pts (0.431) Montreal Canadiens – 82 pts (0.421) Pittsburgh Penguins – 81 pts (0.409) New York Islanders – 81 pts (0.403) Boston Bruins – 80 pts (0.404) Detroit Red Wings – 80 pts (0.398) Columbus Blue Jackets – 79 pts (0.399) Ottawa Senators – 75 pts (0.385) Philadelphia Flyers – 74 pts (0.374) Washington Capitals – 74 pts (0.363) Florida Panthers – 69 pts (0.354) New Jersey Devils – 68 pts (0.343) Toronto Maple Leafs – 68 pts (0.338) New York Rangers – 64 pts (0.323) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
